{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Production Manager",
  "description": "Micdee Designs Limited strives to shape built environments that serve the dreams and needs of people today with considerations from the past and a focus on the future. Our approach is unique. We believe the most timeless, impactful designs come from an understanding rooted in the processes of our clients, their customers / market and the basic human condition. The creative process starts with collaborative engagements with the client and their teams. The information garnered serves as the springboard from which innovation is born. Our designs are shaped to ensure their needs and objectives are met and the resulting product is rooted in social, ecological and economic sustainability. Considerations are also made for cultural sustainability. It is important that whatever product is realised has a sense of place and context.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Production Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Role Summary


	The Production Manager is responsible for overseeing the end-to-end production process &mdash; from job intake to finished product &mdash; ensuring output meets quality standards, deadlines are met, and the factory floor operates efficiently and accountably.


Key Responsibilities
Production Planning &amp; Scheduling:


	Translate client briefs and design specs into a production schedule
	Assign jobs to the right workers and machines based on capacity and skill
	Monitor job progress daily and flag delays before they compound
	Coordinate with the Procurement Officer to ensure materials are available ahead of production


Floor Supervision &amp; Accountability:


	Supervise factory workers and machine operators day-to-day
	Ensure every worker understands their task, the spec, and the standard expected
	Conduct daily floor walks to monitor work in progress
	Address performance issues directly and escalate where necessary


Quality Control:


	Implement and enforce stage-gate checks at critical production points
	Ensure the Industrial Architect&rsquo;s specs are properly handed off and understood before work begins
	Review finished products before dispatch and reject substandard work
	Track rework and defects, identify patterns, and drive corrective action


Finishing &amp; Dispatch:


	Own the finishing stage &mdash; edge banding, assembly, surface quality
	Ensure nothing leaves the factory without a final quality sign-off
	Coordinate with the Installer on pre-dispatch checks for installation jobs


Reporting &amp; Communication:


	Report daily/weekly production status to the Factory Manager
	Maintain simple production logs &mdash; jobs in progress, completed, delayed, rejected
	Flag resource, manpower, or equipment issues promptly


Team Development:


	Identify skill gaps on the floor and recommend training
	Mentor and develop promising workers into more responsible roles
	Build a culture of ownership and quality on the floor


Requirements


	Minimum 3-5 years of experience in a furniture, woodworking, or board processing factory
	Strong understanding of production processes &mdash; cutting, edge banding, lamination, assembly
	Ability to read and interpret technical drawings and specs
	Proven supervisory experience
	Hands-on, floor-present leadership style
	Strong attention to detail and quality standards.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-06",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-07",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Micdee Designs Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "198521"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Production Manager Job at Micdee Designs Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Micdee Designs Limited strives to shape built environments that serve the dreams and needs of people today with considerations from the past and a focus on the future. Our approach is unique. We believe the most timeless, impactful designs come from an understanding rooted in the processes of our clients, their customers / market and the basic human condition. The creative process starts with collaborative engagements with the client and their teams. The information garnered serves as the springboard from which innovation is born. Our designs are shaped to ensure their needs and objectives are met and the resulting product is rooted in social, ecological and economic sustainability. Considerations are also made for cultural sustainability. It is important that whatever product is realised has a sense of place and context.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Production Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Role Summary


	The Production Manager is responsible for overseeing the end-to-end production process — from job intake to finished product — ensuring output meets quality standards, deadlines are met, and the factory floor operates efficiently and accountably.


Key Responsibilities
Production Planning & Scheduling:


	Translate client briefs and design specs into a production schedule
	Assign jobs to the right workers and machines based on capacity and skill
	Monitor job progress daily and flag delays before they compound
	Coordinate with the Procurement Officer to ensure materials are available ahead of production


Floor Supervision & Accountability:


	Supervise factory workers and machine operators day-to-day
	Ensure every worker understands their task, the spec, and the standard expected
	Conduct daily floor walks to monitor work in progress
	Address performance issues directly and escalate where necessary


Quality Control:


	Implement and enforce stage-gate checks at critical production points
	Ensure the Industrial Architect’s specs are properly handed off and understood before work begins
	Review finished products before dispatch and reject substandard work
	Track rework and defects, identify patterns, and drive corrective action


Finishing & Dispatch:


	Own the finishing stage — edge banding, assembly, surface quality
	Ensure nothing leaves the factory without a final quality sign-off
	Coordinate with the Installer on pre-dispatch checks for installation jobs


Reporting & Communication:


	Report daily/weekly production status to the Factory Manager
	Maintain simple production logs — jobs in progress, completed, delayed, rejected
	Flag resource, manpower, or equipment issues promptly


Team Development:


	Identify skill gaps on the floor and recommend training
	Mentor and develop promising workers into more responsible roles
	Build a culture of ownership and quality on the floor


Requirements


	Minimum 3-5 years of experience in a furniture, woodworking, or board processing factory
	Strong understanding of production processes — cutting, edge banding, lamination, assembly
	Ability to read and interpret technical drawings and specs
	Proven supervisory experience
	Hands-on, floor-present leadership style
	Strong attention to detail and quality    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Silviarecuits Consultancy is a startup HR and recruitment firm based in Abuja, Nigeria. We specialize in connecting businesses with top talent by providing tailored recruitment solutions across various industries. Our mission is to support organizations in building high-performing teams while helping job seekers access rewarding career opportunities. As a growing consultancy, we combine local market expertise with innovative recruitment strategies to deliver efficient, reliable, and people-centered hiring services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, reports, and reconciliations
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes
	Monitor cash flow, expenses, and budget performance
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian tax regulations (PAYE, VAT, WHT, etc.)
	Handle statutory remittances and liaise with regulatory bodies
	Support payroll processing and financial documentation
	Conduct bank reconciliations and ledger management
	Assist with audits and ensure proper documentation of financial transactions
	Provide financial insights to support strategic decision-making


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	3&ndash;5 years of relevant experience
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian financial regulations and tax systems
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	High level of accuracy, integrity, and attention to detail
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
	Ability to meet deadlines and work independent.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitmentconsult@zohomail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Accountant Job at Silviarecuits Consultancy




        
    

        
        Silviarecuits Consultancy is a startup HR and recruitment firm based in Abuja, Nigeria. We specialize in connecting businesses with top talent by providing tailored recruitment solutions across various industries. Our mission is to support organizations in building high-performing teams while helping job seekers access rewarding career opportunities. As a growing consultancy, we combine local market expertise with innovative recruitment strategies to deliver efficient, reliable, and people-centered hiring services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant
Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, reports, and reconciliations
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes
	Monitor cash flow, expenses, and budget performance
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian tax regulations (PAYE, VAT, WHT, etc.)
	Handle statutory remittances and liaise with regulatory bodies
	Support payroll processing and financial documentation
	Conduct bank reconciliations and ledger management
	Assist with audits and ensure proper documentation of financial transactions
	Provide financial insights to support strategic decision-making


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	3–5 years of relevant experience
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian financial regulations and tax systems
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	High level of accuracy, integrity, and attention to detail
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
	Ability to meet deadlines and work independent.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Onyx Beauty Hub is a luxury hair brand that offer wholesale and retail of virgin hair and raw single donor hairs . We offer variety of hair textures, including straight, wavy and curly hairs. Our hairs are carefully sourced and selected from various donors in China,Vietnam,Laos, Cambodia, Philippines, India,Burma,Argentina

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	This role is responsible for consistent daily posting, active page management, and engaging customers to drive sales opportunities.
	Ensure all products are visible
	Maintain consistent content flow
	Drive fast, conversion-focused engagement


Key Responsibilities
Page Management &amp; Posting:


	Manage all social media platforms daily (Instagram, TikTok, etc.).
	Maintain consistent daily posting without gaps.
	Publish multiple daily posts (feed and stories) during active hours.
	Ensure all products for the month are posted and actively promoted.


Content Execution &amp; Collaboration:


	Work with the team to create and execute content.
	Contribute ideas for videos, Reels, and campaigns.
	Ensure all content aligns with the brand (luxury, lifestyle, easy-to-wear).


Product Visibility &amp; Campaign Execution:


	Ensure all products (new and existing) are consistently visible.
	Support product launches with teasers and coordinated posting.
	Repost and promote older designs alongside new drops.


Community Engagement &amp; Sales Support:


	Respond promptly to comments and direct messages.
	Actively engage followers and build strong relationships.
	Convert interactions into qualified leads.
	Initiate conversations and hand over leads to the sales team for closure.


Website Product Management:


	Upload and manage products on the website.
	Ensure accurate product images, pricing, and availability.
	Update inventory status and remove or mark sold-out items.
	Maintain real-time accuracy between social media and website listings.


Performance Monitoring:


	Track engagement metrics (comments, DMs, interactions).
	Identify high-performing content that drives interest and inquiries.


Requirements


	Proven experience managing social media pages (beauty/fashion preferred).
	Strong communication and engagement skills.
	Ability to handle high-volume posting in a fast-paced environment.
	Basic content creation skills (video editing, captions, trend adaptation).
	Experience uploading products on websites (or willingness to learn).
	Highly organized, consistent, and detail-oriented.


Work Structure:


	Daily active posting is required.
	Monthly product sheet must be fully executed (all items posted and promoted).
	Weekly content flow includes:
	
		Product teasers
		Launch execution
		Ongoing product rotation
	
	
	Daily story updates are mandatory.
	Weekly structured content (carousels and planned posts) required.


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Competitive Salary: N200,000 - N250,000 per month.
	Performance-based incentives
	Growth and career advancement opportunities


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, Portfolio+ links to pages they have managed&nbsp;to:&nbsp;hronyxhairbynelly@gmail.com&nbsp;using the job title&nbsp;as the subject of the email.",

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Real Estate Marketer",
  "description": "Permanent Capital Ventures is a venture studio launching new companies with fully developed technology and infrastructure already in place.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Real Estate Marketer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for a results-driven Real Estate Marketer with at least 2 years of experience to join our marketing team.
	The ideal candidate is a strategic thinker with a proven track record of generating high-quality leads and increasing brand visibility in the competitive property market.


Job Responsibilities


	Business development
	Develop and execute multi-channel marketing campaigns (Social Media, Email, PPC) to promote property listings.
	Conduct market research to identify trends and competitor strategies within the real estate sector.
	Manage the company&#39;s online presence, including website updates and SEO optimization for property keywords.
	Coordinate professional photography, videography, and virtual tours for new listings.
	Create engaging content for brochures, newsletters, and blog posts to educate potential buyers and investors.
	Track and analyze campaign performance metrics (ROI, Lead Conversion) and provide regular reports.


Job Requirements


	Education: Degree in Marketing, Business, or Communications preferred.
	Experience: Minimum of 2 years in real estate marketing or a closely related field.
	Digital Proficiency: Hands-on experience with CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot), Meta
	Business Suite, and Google Ads.
	Creative Skills: Familiarity with Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar design tools.
	Knowledge: Understanding of real estate regulations and local market dynamics.
	Strong copywriting and storytelling ability.
	Excellent communication and relationship-building skills.
	Data-driven mindset with an ability to interpret analytics
	Project management skills with the ability to handle multiple listings simultaneously.
	A proactive &quot;hunter&quot; mentality for lead generation.


Mthod of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;support@perma-capital.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Real Estate Marketer Job at Permanent Capital Ventures Limited




        
    

        
        Permanent Capital Ventures is a venture studio launching new companies with fully developed technology and infrastructure already in place.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Real Estate Marketer

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a results-driven Real Estate Marketer with at least 2 years of experience to join our marketing team.
	The ideal candidate is a strategic thinker with a proven track record of generating high-quality leads and increasing brand visibility in the competitive property market.


Job Responsibilities


	Business development
	Develop and execute multi-channel marketing campaigns (Social Media, Email, PPC) to promote property listings.
	Conduct market research to identify trends and competitor strategies within the real estate sector.
	Manage the company's online presence, including website updates and SEO optimization for property keywords.
	Coordinate professional photography, videography, and virtual tours for new listings.
	Create engaging content for brochures, newsletters, and blog posts to educate potential buyers and investors.
	Track and analyze campaign performance metrics (ROI, Lead Conversion) and provide regular reports.


Job Requirements


	Education: Degree in Marketing, Business, or Communications preferred.
	Experience: Minimum of 2 years in real estate marketing or a closely related field.
	Digital Proficiency: Hands-on experience with CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot), Meta
	Business Suite, and Google Ads.
	Creative Skills: Familiarity with Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar design tools.
	Knowledge: Understanding of real estate regulations and local market dynamics.
	Strong copywriting and storytelling ability.
	Excellent communication and relationship-building skills.
	Data-driven mindset with an ability to interpret analytics
	Project management skills with the ability to handle multiple listings simultaneously.
	A proactive "hunter" mentality for lead generation.


Mthod of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Social / Communications Manager Job at Bretty Consultancy Services




        
    

        
        Bretty Consultancy Services - Our client, a reputable school located in the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), Abuja, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social / Communications Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A reputable school in the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), Abuja, is seeking to hire a creative and experienced Social/Communications Manager to manage its internal and external communications.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for enhancing the school’s brand presence, managing digital platforms, and ensuring effective communication with stakeholders.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement communication and social media strategies
	Manage the school’s online presence across all social media platforms
	Create engaging content (text, images, and videos) to promote school activities and achievements
	Handle internal and external communications, including newsletters, announcements, and press releases
	Monitor and respond to inquiries on digital platforms in a timely manner
	Organize and promote school events and campaigns
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and image for the school
	Track and report on engagement and communication performance.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Communications, Public Relations, Marketing, or a related field
	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience in social media management or communications
	Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills
	Proficiency in digital marketing tools and social media platforms
	Excellent interpersonal and organizational skills
	Experience in an educational institution is an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
